title: aristea angolensis subsp. majubensis
intro: Aristea angolensis subsp. majubensis, also known as the Aristea or African Aristea, is a plant species belonging to the Iridaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Aristea angolensis subsp. majubensis include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture for its medicinal purposes.
